title: Asking for a Raise 申请加薪

lines.en: Could we talk about my salary when you are free?
lines.zh: 您有空的时候，能聊聊我的工资吗？

lines.en: Sure. What is on your mind?
I have been here for two years and my responsibilities have grown a lot.
lines.zh: 我已经入职两年了，职责增加了很多。

lines.en: That is true. You have done great work.
lines.zh: 确实如此，你工作做得很好。

lines.en: Thank you. I was hoping we could discuss a raise.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我希望我们能谈谈加薪的事。

lines.en: I understand. What number do you have in mind?
lines.zh: 我理解。你期望的涨幅是多少？

lines.en: I was thinking of a 10 percent increase.
I cannot promise that right now, but I will look into it.
lines.zh: 我现在不能承诺，但我会考虑的。

lines.en: I appreciate it. Please let me know your decision.
lines.zh: 非常感谢。有决定请告诉我。
